title: Instant Spend Cards
summary: Designed and launched an Instant Spend feature allowing approved users to provision cards immediately to digital wallets. Eliminated the traditional 10-working-day waiting period for physical cards, driving a massive surge in activation rate and day-one transaction volume.

title: FlexiPay Automation & Acquisition
summary: Led three cross-functional engineering teams to optimize the acquisition experience for FlexiPay. Transformed a heavily manual process into a seamless, cost-efficient, and end-to-end automated lending solution, unlocking instant access to short-term financing for small businesses.
